data.title: Explore: Is .skogai/knowledge/ self-explanatory?
data.description:
Read .skogai/knowledge/SKOGAI.md and the contents of .skogai/knowledge/.

Report:

* Does [SKOGAI.md](<http://SKOGAI.md>) explain the purpose and usage of the knowledge/ directory?
* Are the subdirectories (decisions/, learnings/, patterns/) present and do they make sense?
* Is anything missing or unclear for a new agent picking this up?
* Does the referenced template (templates/knowledge-entry.md) exist and is it usable?

This is an explore-only task. Report findings, do not make changes.
